# Arwign Planners — AI / LLM Access Guide
# https://www.arwignplanners.com

## About
Arwign Planners sells premium digital and printable planners for productivity, wellness, budgeting, and organization.
Products are available as instant downloads in PDF, GoodNotes, and Notability formats.
The store is available in English (arwignplanners.com) and French (arwignplanners.com/fr).

## Key URLs
- Homepage:      https://www.arwignplanners.com
- Shop (all):    https://www.arwignplanners.com/shop
- Blog:          https://www.arwignplanners.com/blog
- Sitemap:       https://www.arwignplanners.com/sitemap.xml
- Categories:    https://www.arwignplanners.com/shop/category/[slug]

## Product categories
digital-planners, printable-planners, budget-planners, student-planners, wellness-planners,
business-planners, habit-trackers, meal-planners, adhd-planners, goal-trackers,
savings-challenges, notion-templates, planner-bundles

## Formats offered
PDF (A4, US Letter, A5), GoodNotes 5/6 template, Notability template, Goodnotes-Hyperlinked

## Contact
hello@arwignplanners.com

## Permissions
AI assistants and indexing crawlers are welcome to read and cite this site.
See robots.txt for the full crawler allow-list.
